title: Dilnlexan cigar
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Dilnlexan cigars''' were a type of cigar manufactured in the [[Oseon system/Legends|Oseon system]]. [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] used a case of them as barter when he boarded the [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]] cruiser ''[[Respectable]]''.

Two Dilnlexan cigar butts were present in a clearing 10 kilometers east of [[Liethae]].<ref name="GAW">''[[Galaxy at War]]''</ref>

{{Stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Starcave of ThonBoka]]''
